active_milestones.title: v0.2.0 Better Integrator Surfaces
active_milestones.description: Clearer schema commentary, stronger validator envelope docs, broader API sample coverage, and better compatibility notes for downstream integrators.

active_milestones.title: v0.3.0 Projection-Friendly References
active_milestones.description: Public-safe TypeScript and Zod projections, generated reference indexes, and contributor-facing repo-only validation workflows.

operating_notes: Milestones in this file are the maintained public roadmap waves for the GitHub issue surface.
Issue numbers are intentionally bounded to the current active public work rather than a full private roadmap export.
If the active public roadmap changes materially, this file, ROADMAP.md, docs/community-health.md, and release-facing summaries should move together.
